CustomField.description: SOQL Queries usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c) || ISBLANK(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c) || AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c = 0, "N/A", IF(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlQueries.WorkItemRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlQueries.WorkItemAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c * 100, 1)) & "% of txn (" & TEXT(LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlQueriesConsumed__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOQL Queries usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.label: SOQL Queries
